option.name: originalContent
option.value:
Krishna Belel
  • Home
  • About
  • Resume
  • Projects
  • Contact
Hello!

I'm Krishna Belel



Software Development Engineer in Test

LinkedIn My works Leetcode

Name: Krishna Belel

Job Role: Software Quality Engineer

Experience:

Address: Mumbai, India

SKILLS:

Selenium/Java 80%
Playwright/Typescript 90%
Rest Assured 80%
API Testing 80%
SQL 90%

About

About Me

I’m Krishna Belel, a dedicated QA Engineer with over 6 years of experience in Automation, Manual and API testing. I specialize in delivering high-quality software by leveraging strong testing methodologies and automation frameworks. My expertise lies in ensuring seamless functionality, driving continuous improvement, and contributing to the development of robust software solutions.

  • Profile: Software Development Engineer in Test
  • Domain: P&C Insurance, Data Analytics, Tax System
  • Education: Bachelor of Engineering
  • Language: Java, Typescript & SQL
  • Automation: Playwright, Selenium & REST Assured
  • Bug Tracking: JIRA, ADO Defect Management, ClickUp
  • Interest: Reading, Drawing, Sports, Anime

Resume

Resume

With over 6 years of experience as a SDET, I specialize in Automation, Manual and API testing. My focus is on delivering high-quality software solutions through advanced testing methodologies and continuous improvement.

Experience


Mar 2025 - Present

Software Development Engineer in Test

Morgan Stanley (via BOUNTEOUS x ACCOLITE)

Morgan Stanley is a leading global financial services firm providing investment banking, securities, wealth management, and investment management services to institutions and individuals worldwide.

  • Driving test automation for Morgan Stanley’s international tax systems, ensuring accuracy and reliability of critical financial data workflows.
  • Designed and implemented scalable automation frameworks using Playwright with TypeScript for end-to-end and API-driven test scenarios.
  • Leveraged AI tools such as GitHub Copilot and Opus to accelerate test case development and improve engineering productivity.
  • Built data-driven test cases by interacting with microservices responsible for sourcing, processing, and enriching financial data.
  • Utilized SQL extensively to extract, validate, and reconcile large datasets for automation and backend validation.
Sep 2023 - Mar 2025

Software Test Engineer

Media.net

Media.net is a leading global ad tech company specializing in contextual advertising solutions to drive engagement and revenue for its clients.

  • Managed QA processes for two products, conducting Manual, API and Automation testing.
  • Worked on automation projects using Selenium with Java and Playwright with TypeScript.
  • Used TestNG for automation builds and integrated Maven for project management.
  • Deployed cron jobs for regular automation suite runs on Debian VMware.
  • Utilized GitLab for version control, code repository management, and CI/CD pipeline implementation.
Jan 2021 - Sep 2023

Senior Quality Engineer

LTIMindtree

LTIMindtree is a global technology consulting and services company that drives digital transformation through innovative IT solutions and consulting services.

  • Developed automated regression test cases for monthly updates, ensuring consistent end-product.
  • Handled complex automation scenarios and improved framework robustness.
  • Experienced in functional, regression, integration, smoke and exploratory testing methodologies.
  • Managed defects using ADO and JIRA, ensuring timely resolution and effective communication.
  • Ensured data integrity through proficient SQL database testing and collaboration with Agile teams.


Education


2016-2020

Bachelor of Engineering

Mumbai University

Grade: 8.46 CGPA

2014-2016

Higher Secondary School

Mithibai Junior College

Grade: 79.23 %

Download Cover

Projects

Projects

Below are the sample Automation Maven projects using Selenium on TestNg and Cucumber framework.


MakeMyTrip - Flight Automation

The MakeMyTrip Flight Trip automation code is constructed utilizing Java Selenium and provides users with the choice of One Way, Round Trip, and Multi Trip options. The code is a Maven project that uses the POM model and incorporates Extent reports to generate test results with screenshots.

Ecommerce - Cart Automation

This is a Selenium code that automates an e-commerce website, covering test cases for registration, login and adding items to the cart. The code is a Maven project that uses Page Factory model & incorporates Cucumber reports to generate detailed test results with screenshots.

More projects on Github

I love to solve business problems & uncover hidden QA stories


GitHub

Contact

Contact Me

Below are the details to reach out to me!

Address

Mumbai, India

Contact Number

+ 91 902 8314 690

Email Address

krishnabelel90@gmail.com

Download Resume

Link
